name: Playtika Holding Corp.
business: Playtika is one of the world's leading operators of mobile games, creating free-to-play games that generate revenue from in-game purchases of virtual items. The company distributes its games through third-party platforms such as the iOS App Store and Google Play Store, as well as its own Direct-to-Consumer platforms.

exposures.sentence: We are one of the world s leading operators of mobile games creating fun, innovative experiences that entertain and engage our users.
